reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio tiene una buena atención en general, falta amabilidad de los playeros al atender y pierden mucho tiempo charlando entre si

(Translated by Google)
The service at the gas station is generally good, but the attendants are not very friendly and waste a lot of time chatting amongst themselves.

reviews.comment:
Hola... Fui a cargar combustible a esta YPF en  dos oportunidades este año veces y no pienso volver... Aparte de que la atención no fue para nada agradable... La primera vez que fui el único baño disponible era para discapacitados... Y la segunda casi encierran a mi hija en el baño de mujeres, no digo que la encerraron porque ella sintió el ruido de las llaves y automáticamente abrío la puerta y había un señor cerrando con llave la puerta... Y quiso sacarla cuestionando que solo lo puede usar si estaba cargando combustible... Aparte cuando quise pagar a través de un app no tenían ese servicio, el problema no era que ni tuvieran el servicio que todas las estaciones que he ido lo tienen, sino  la mala predisposición del que me atendió...

(Translated by Google)
Hello... I went to this YPF station twice this year to fill up, and I don't plan on going back. Besides the fact that the service was terrible... The first time I went, the only available restroom was for disabled people. And the second time, they almost locked my daughter in the women's restroom. I don't say they locked her in, because she heard the keys and automatically opened the door, and there was a man locking it. He tried to get her out, questioning why she could only use it while filling up. Also, when I tried to pay through an app, they didn't have that service. The problem wasn't that they didn't have the service, which all the other stations I've been to have, but the bad attitude of the person who served me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqMXFfeGZnEAE

reviews.comment:
La peor estación de servicios de Mar del Plata, los empleados se ve que no cobran hace muchos meses, porque para atenderte.en promedio estas 30 minutos, no la recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
The worst gas station in Mar del Plata. The employees clearly haven't been paid in months, because you wait an average of 30 minutes to get served. I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqdlBUdUVREAE

reviews.comment:
No nos quisieron  atender x que estaban cambiando el turno. El playero nos dijo q a las 13:28 hs cambiaba el turno. Eran las 13:25 . Encima atendió a otra persona q llegó después

(Translated by Google)
They refused to serve us because they were changing the shift. The attendant told us the shift would change at 1:28 PM. It was 1:25 PM. On top of that, he served another person who arrived later.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEOGRMMzFBRRAB
